roles.title: Software Developer
roles.summary: Developed Later's social platform with React, Ember.js and Ruby on Rails, collaborating across Engineering, QA, PM and Design in an agile team.

roles.title: Software Developer
roles.summary: Built geology apps with React, TypeScript and Python, heavily leveraging AWS — Lambda, Amplify, S3, CloudWatch and DynamoDB — provisioned with Terraform.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.summary: Built a custom form builder in React, TypeScript and Redux, and authored an ORM (JSON-SQL) that eased API interaction via a façade pattern.

roles.title: Associate Software Engineer
roles.summary: Built enterprise, cloud-based sales performance software and migrated a multi-page experience into a SPA, improving engagement by 20%.

roles.title: UI Engineer Intern
roles.summary: Practised disciplined scrum within Xactly's SDLC and handled web operations across front-end and back-end integration.
